Container.Name: Hermes Suite
Container.Overview:
Hermes Suite combines Hermes Agent, Hermes Dashboard, and Hermes WebUI into one container so Unraid users can install a single Community App instead of managing three linked containers.
This template keeps compatibility with the existing Hermes appdata layout used by mmartial's Hermes Agent, Dashboard, and WebUI templates. Reuse the same Hermes home path at /mnt/user/appdata/hermes-agent/hermes-home and the same workspace path at /mnt/user/appdata/hermes-agent/workspace.
Migration from old three-container setups is experimental and fresh installs are safest. Do not delete old containers, appdata folders, or Docker volumes before backup and verification. The legacy /opt/hermes mapping is compatibility-only and usually Hermes source/runtime content, not user config.
Warning: Hermes Dashboard and Hermes WebUI can expose sensitive configuration data, including API key management. Do not publish them directly to the internet without additional protection. Prefer LAN-only access, Tailscale, a VPN, or a reverse proxy with authentication.
Container.Changes: 20260509: Initial Hermes Suite combined template release

Config.Name: HERMES_UID
Config.Description: UID used by Hermes Suite. Keep aligned with WANTED_UID for shared-path compatibility.

Config.Name: HERMES_GID
Config.Description: GID used by Hermes Suite. Keep aligned with WANTED_GID for shared-path compatibility.

Config.Name: WANTED_UID
Config.Description: Accepted for Hermes WebUI compatibility. Keep aligned with HERMES_UID.

Config.Name: WANTED_GID
Config.Description: Accepted for Hermes WebUI compatibility. Keep aligned with HERMES_GID.

Config.Name: HERMES_HOME
Config.Description: Hermes Agent home directory inside the container

Config.Name: Hermes Home Path
Config.Description: Existing Hermes Agent appdata path. Reuse this when migrating from the three-container setup.

Config.Name: Hermes Workspace Path
Config.Description: Workspace path used by Hermes WebUI

Config.Name: Legacy /opt/hermes Source Volume - Experimental, backup first
Config.Description: Optional experimental compatibility mount for old three-container installs. This is usually the Hermes source/runtime volume, not user config. Do not use this unless you have backed up your old appdata and Docker volumes. Enter hermes_shared_volume only if you know you need it, or leave blank for fresh installs. This is a Docker named volume, not a host filesystem path.

Config.Name: HERMES_GATEWAY_URL
Config.Description: Internal gateway URL used by the combined container and health checks

Config.Name: API_SERVER_KEY
Config.Description: Optional Hermes API bearer token. Leave blank to let Hermes Suite generate and persist one automatically.

Config.Name: DASHBOARD_PORT
Config.Description: Dashboard bind port inside the container

Config.Name: WEBUI_PORT
Config.Description: Hermes WebUI bind port inside the container
